## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance is growing across destinations, with recent articles performing well](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [New landing page templates for destinations are being developed to improve user experience and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Content strategy is expanding to include packing lists and articles about new dolphin encounter regulations](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Team is working on streamlining content approval process to accelerate traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Recent articles performing well:](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
      - [Vallarta: Mexico Vacation Destinations, Is Puerto Vallarta Safe, Nightlife Guide](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Cancun: Sargassum article, Drinking Age, 4th of July, Five Pyramids Close to Cancun](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Cabo: Things to Do in the Months, The Arches](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Shopping in Puerto Vallarta and Malecón articles showing quick success](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Food in Cancun starting to rank fast](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### New Tour and Destination Updates

  - [New boat tour launched from Puerto Morelos \~2 months ago](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [Available for booking from entire Riviera Maya/Cancun area](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [Stops near Punta Maroma](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Clarification on Holbox ferry information for article creation](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [Adventures Group offers private boat transfer as part of tour package](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

### Landing Page Template Development

  - [New template created for destination guides (e.g., Marietas Island)](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Challenges with current template:](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Lack of visual distinction from blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Need for improved formatting and layout](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Agreed to work on improving template design:](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
      - [Add carousel of tours higher up the page](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Improve text formatting and spacing](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
      - [Consider adding video content](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [URL structure: agreed on "travel-guide-\[destination-name\]" format](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Content Strategy and Workflow

  - [Proposal to create articles highlighting TripAdvisor 2025 awards](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
      - [Individual articles for each winning tour](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [General article on award-winning tours in Mexico](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Discussion on streamlining content approval process](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
      - [Mariana to self-approve some articles to accelerate publishing](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Team to review post-publication and make necessary edits](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [New content ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Monthly packing lists for destinations (high search volume potential)](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Articles on new dolphin encounter regulations and experiences](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

### Dolphin Encounter Regulation Changes

  - [New approach focuses on respectful, natural encounters](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Changes in interaction: dolphins approach visitors instead of vice versa](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Positive guest feedback on new experience](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Longer interaction time for entire groups](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Enhanced educational component at the beginning of programs](https://fathom.video/share/irsbzvKbFyW6F7TPAsQgz821QtAgXBBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)

## Next Steps

  - Improve formatting and layout of new destination guide template
  - Create articles highlighting TripAdvisor 2025 awards
  - Implement streamlined content approval process for faster publishing
  - Develop monthly packing list articles for destinations
  - Create articles about new dolphin encounter regulations and experiences
  - Continue updating content to remove references to old dolphin interaction methods
